title: A Woman's Testament
director: Kon Ichikawa, Yasuzô Masumura, Kôzaburô Yoshimura
actors: Ayako Wakao, Hiroshi Kawaguchi, Sachiko Hidari
plot: Three stories about modern women. The first works in a nightclub and plans to marry the boss. The second is used by a real estate agent as a lure for customers. The third is a retired geisha who waits to be reunited with her jaile...
